title: swertia neglecta
intro: Swertia neglecta, also known as the yellow gentian, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Swertia neglecta include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
